title: [IOS]App Settings - General - Account - Log in - Log out - Cancel
scenario: Account login/logout flow in Poly Studio Mobile App Settings > General shows correct behavior when logging in and cancelling logout
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app as a guest user.
2. Tap the hamburger icon (☰) to open App Settings.
6. Enter valid credentials and complete the login flow.
9. Observe the login dialog that appears.
expected: Step 7: 'Your account' text is visible with Name and Email fields populated. Step 9: Login dialog opens with 'Cancel' and 'Continue' options. Step 11: Dialog disappears and user remains logged in (still sees 'Your account' with Name and Email).
